name: OpenMW-TES3MP
description:
TES3MP is a project adding multiplayer functionality to OpenMW, a free and open source engine recreation of the popular Bethesda Softworks game "The Elder Scrolls III: Morrowind".

As of version 0.7.0, TES3MP is fully playable, providing very extensive player, NPC, world and quest synchronization, as well as state saving and loading, all of which are highly customizable via serverside Lua scripts.

Remaining gameplay problems mostly relate to AI and the synchronization of clientside script variables.

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

ports.name: TCP - GamePort
ports.description: TCP Gameport (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new TCP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to change the port number in the config!)

ports.name: UDP - GamePort
ports.description: UDP Gameport (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to change the port number in the config!)

variables.name: Game Version
variables.description: Preferred game version goes here (set to ‘latest’ to download the latest and check on every startup if there is a newer version available)

variables.name: Extra Game Parameters
variables.description: Extra startup Parameters if needed (leave empty if not needed)

variables.name: UMASK
variables.description: Permissions for newly created files. Don’t change unless you are knowing what you are doing!
